calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:21am and concluding at 9:32am (D505)

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. appearing via zoom represented by George Aposnhian, Esq.
Witness for Plaintiff Omar Rose appeared via zoom, was placed under oath, and testified.
Defendant Rolem, L.L.C. aka Rolem LLC not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees. Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditor's Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against Defendant ROlem L.L.C. aka Rolem LLC, as follows:

Damages: $32,661.44
Prejudgment Interest: $691.20
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $1,037.68

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $37,215.32

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
